description: A black-and-white engraving depicting two nude male figures walking together through an expansive Italianate landscape. The inscription at the bottom reads 'Apollo et Hyacinthus,' identifying the scene as from classical mythology rather than biblical narrative. Rolling hills, ancient ruins, mountains, and clusters of trees fill the background. Smaller figures and animals appear in the middle distance. The composition emphasizes the vast, idyllic landscape as much as the mythological subject.
